title: Verve AI - AI E-Commerce Forecasting Software
metaDescription: Verve AI Forecasting helps e-commerce brands precisely predict demand—no spreadsheets, no guesswork. Smarter inventory planning starts here.

For Shopify

WooCommerce

Enjoy a 14 day free trial and set up in minutes

Why choose Verve AI?

We've been in your shoes, running e-commerce stores, fighting with spreadsheets and CSV exports.

Simple Pricing

Easy monthly subscription, with no restriction on product count or order volume.

No Hidden Fees

Transparent pricing with no surprises.

Risk-Free Trial

Try all our AI forecasting features for free

Cancel Anytime

Cancel your plan at any time.

Pricing - FAQ

Can I try Verve AI before paying?

Yes — you can install Verve AI and explore all features during the free trial period. You’ll only be charged once you decide to keep using the app after the trial ends. There are no hidden fees or setup charges.

Do I need a credit card to start the trial?

No. Shopify handles all billing directly through your Shopify account, so you won’t need to enter payment details separately. You’ll see the subscription appear in your Shopify billing dashboard once the trial ends.

Can I cancel anytime?

Absolutely. You’re in full control. If you decide Verve AI isn’t right for your business, you can uninstall the app or cancel your subscription directly from your Shopify admin — no email requests or notice periods required.

Will Verve AI affect my store’s performance?

Not at all. Verve AI runs entirely in the background and connects directly to your Shopify API — it doesn’t add scripts or tracking code that might slow your storefront.

Do I need any technical setup?

No. Verve AI connects automatically to your Shopify data — just install the app and it will start analyzing your orders and inventory within minutes.

Who can I contact if I need help?

You can reach our support team anytime via in-app chat or email. We’re happy to help with setup, forecasting insights, or anything else you need to get the most value from Verve AI.

Is my store data secure?

Yes — your data is completely safe. Verve AI connects to your store using Shopify’s secure OAuth system, which ensures we only access the information needed to generate forecasts. All data is encrypted both in transit and at rest, and we never share or store your Shopify access tokens outside of secure servers. Your privacy and store security are always our top priority.

Say goodbye to spreadsheets and CSVs

Enjoy a 14 day free trial and set up in minutes

For Shopify
